shelf_1080.precise_instruction: Attach the short support bar to the side of the vertical panel.
Attach the second side panel to the exposed end of the lower crossbar.
Attach the triangular side support to the right side of the frame.
Attach the right side support to the outer edge of the shelf panel.
Attach the upright side support to the right side of the base frame.
Attach the lower shelf panel between the two side frames.
Attach the upper side panel between the left front post and the rear post.
Attach the top panel across the upper side supports.
Attach the tall upright panel to the back right side of the shelf frame.
Attach the second tall upright to the back corner of the shelf frame.
Attach the long side upright to the left side of the frame at the front corner.
Attach the inner vertical support to the left side of the frame beside the shelf.
Insert the upper shelf panel between the side frames above the middle shelf.
Insert the top shelf panel between the side supports.
Attach the top panel between the upper side supports.
Insert the top shelf panel between the side supports at the top.
Attach the top back rail between the two upper side posts.
Attach the top front rail between the two front uprights above the top shelf.
